# P-D-003 — Site mismatch (work at different coordinates)

> Site d'exécution incohérent

## Description (EN)

Satellite activity ≥ 500 m from the GPS coordinates declared in the contract.

## Description (FR)

Activité satellitaire à plus de 500 m des coordonnées GPS déclarées dans le marché.

<!-- END auto-generated -->

## Detection logic

Site mismatch — the geocoded project location does not match where construction is actually happening (per satellite). Catches the case of the project executing at a different site than declared, often a related-party site.

## Likelihood-ratio reasoning

Default prior 0.35 + weight 0.85.

## Known false-positive traps

- **Geocoding error** in the original project declaration.

## Production wiring

Requires both the declared site coordinates AND the satellite imagery footprint.
